name: Winter Tango Festival (Tangomarkkinat)
traditions: Open-air tango dancing; tango singing competitions; crowning of Tango King and Queen; milongas in Seinäjoki.
historicalBackground: Finland adopted tango in the early 20th century, developing a uniquely melancholic Finnish style. The festival has been held annually since 1985.
description: Finland's beloved summer tango festival, where thousands dance the uniquely Finnish style of tango under northern summer skies.
